.TCP/IP protocol family hierarchy
TCP/IP协议族层次结构。

4. Database design principles 
The goal of database design is to fully meet the business data storage requirements. If a reasonable 
database model can be designed, it will not only reduce the difficulty of program programming and 
maintenance, but also improve the performance of the actual operation of the system. Therefore, it is 
necessary to carefully formulate the design step scheme, understand the design method of the 
specification and the necessary rules. 
A successful management system is composed of: [50% of the business + 50% of the software], and 
50% of the successful software is composed of [25% of the database +25% of the program], the 
quality of the database design is a key. If you compare enterprise data to the blood of life, then 
database design is the most important part of the application. 
For network traffic monitoring management system, has a large number of online personnel need 
strong database support, but for the system, due to not run in a real environment, so the use of the 
database can choose easy to use, and easy to maintain, easy access to the database as a background to 
store information such as Internet cafes database eventually chose to support database as the 
background.

4. 数据库设计原则
数据库设计的目的是要充分满足业务数据存储的要求。如果能设计出一个合理的数据库模型，不仅能减少程序编程和维护的难度，还能提高系统实际运行时的性能。因此，必须仔细制定设计步骤方案，了解规范的设计方法和必要的规则。

成功的管理系统由以下组成：[50%的业务+50%的软件]，而成功软件的50%由[25%的数据库+25%的程序]组成，数据库设计的质量是关键。如果将企业数据比作生命之血，那么数据库设计就是应用程序最重要的部分。

对于网络流量监控管理系统来说，需要强大的数据库支持以满足大量在线人员的需求。但是对于该系统，由于它不在真实环境中运行，因此数据库选择应该是易于使用、易于维护、易于访问的数据库。最终选择支持数据库作为后台来存储各种信息，比如网吧数据库。

5. Conceptual structure design 
E-r model and relational model are two different descriptions of database. In e-R model, entity sets 
and relationships are used to represent things in the real world and their relationships with each other. 
In a relational model, data is organized in a single structure. So, here is the problem of how to turn the 
E-R model into a relational model. Here are a few guidelines to follow for conversion: 
(A). Each entity in the E-R model is transformed into a relationship of the same name, the 
attributes of the entity set are the attributes of the relationship, and the codes of the entity set are the 
codes of the relationship. 
(B). Each association in the E-R model is also represented as a relationship, and the code of the set 
of entities associated with the association and the attributes of the association are converted to the 
attributes of the relationship. The code for this relationship has three cases: 
(a). If the association is 1:1, the code for each entity is a candidate code for the relationship. 
(b). If the relation is 1: n, the code of the relation is the code of the n-terminal entity set. 
(c). If the relation is M: n, the code of the relation is the combination of the code of each entity set. 
(C). Relational schemas with the same code can be merged (merge principle). 
Here we are going to design the conceptual schema for the database. Based on the analysis of the 
data flow diagram and data dictionary, we can determine the relationships among the entities, 
attributes, and entities in the application, as shown in Figures 2 and 3 below.

5. 概念结构设计
E-R模型和关系模型是描述数据库的两种不同模型。在E-R模型中，实体集和关系用于表示现实世界中的事物及它们之间的关系。在关系模型中，数据组织在单一的结构内。因此，如何将E-R模型转换为关系模型是一个问题。下面是一些转换的指导原则：

(A)。将E-R模型中的每个实体转换成同名的关系，实体集的属性成为关系的属性，实体集的代码成为关系的代码。

(B)。将E-R模型中的每个关联也表示为一个关系，将与关联相关的实体集合的代码和关联的属性转换为关系的属性。该关系的代码有三种情况：

(a)。如果关联是1:1，则每个实体的代码是关系的候选码。
(b)。如果关联是1:n，则关系的代码是n端实体集的代码。
(c)。如果关联是M:n，则关系的代码是每个实体集代码的组合。

(C)。具有相同代码的关系模式可以合并（合并原则）。
在这里，我们将为数据库设计概念模式。基于数据流图和数据字典的分析，我们可以确定应用程序中的实体、属性和实体之间的关系，如下图所示。

Design and Implementation of office automation network 
security system
设计和实施办公自动化网络安全系统
Corresponding author
通讯作者
. Log rule entities and their property diagrams

Log rule实体及其属性图：

1. User Entity (用户实体)
- User ID (用户ID)
- Username (用户名)
- Password (密码)
- Email (电子邮件)
- Phone Number (电话号码)

2. Log Entity (日志实体)
- Log ID (日志ID)
- Timestamp (时间戳)
- Event Type (事件类型)
- Event Details (事件细节)

3. System Entity (系统实体)
- System ID (系统ID)
- System Name (系统名称)
- System Description (系统描述)
- System Location (系统位置)

4. Role Entity (角色实体)
- Role ID (角色ID)
- Role Name (角色名称)
- Role Description (角色描述)

5. Permission Entity (权限实体)
- Permission ID (权限ID)
- Permission Name (权限名称)
- Permission Description (权限描述)

以上是常见的Log Rule实体及其属性图，它们被用于记录、管理和控制系统中的日志、用户、系统、角色和权限等方面的信息。
Packet entities and their property diagrams

数据包实体及其属性图：

1. Packet Entity (数据包实体)
- Packet ID (数据包ID)
- Source IP Address (源IP地址)
- Destination IP Address (目的IP地址)
- Source MAC Address (源MAC地址)
- Destination MAC Address (目的MAC地址)
- Timestamp (时间戳)
- Protocol (协议)

2. Protocol Entity (协议实体)
- Protocol ID (协议ID)
- Protocol Name (协议名称)
- Protocol Description (协议描述)

3. Source Entity (源实体)
- Source ID (源ID)
- Source IP Address (源IP地址)
- Source MAC Address (源MAC地址)

4. Destination Entity (目的实体)
- Destination ID (目标ID)
- Destination IP Address (目标IP地址)
- Destination MAC Address (目标MAC地址)

以上实体及其属性图用于记录、分析和管理网络数据包的相关信息，如源和目的IP地址、MAC地址、时间戳以及协议类型等。在网络安全领域，这些实体及其属性图通常被用于威胁检测、入侵检测和网络流量分析等场景。

逻辑结构设计分为三个步骤：
(a). 将概念结构（E-R图）转换为通用关系模型；
(b). 将转换后的关系模型转换为Microsoft Office Access 2003支持的数据模型；
(c). 为了优化数据模型、消除冗余字段并最小化处理，安装信息表如表1所示。

6. Conclusion 
This paper introduces the whole process of designing and implementing a network monitoring system 
under VC++ platform. Through the analysis of more popular network monitoring system developmenttechnology, the characteristics of the system, based on the socket using VC++ development tools to 
achieve the network monitoring system solution. The intelligent management system design method 
based on VC++ has a clear design process and a clear hierarchy, which is conducive to the expansion 
and upgrade of the system and the maintenance and testing of the system.

6. 结论
本文介绍了在VC++平台下设计和实施网络监控系统的整个过程。通过对更流行的网络监控系统开发技术的分析，结合系统的特点，利用VC++开发工具基于socket实现了网络监控系统的解决方案。基于VC++的智能管理系统设计方法具有清晰的设计过程和明确的层次结构，有利于系统的扩展和升级以及系统的维护和测试。
